paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 229 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 177 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 63 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 2 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 9 days past due with 40 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **25 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 8 payment tasks due this week.

**Charles Harris — Argyle TX:** The oldest overdue task is 41 days past due with 39 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **4 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** Overdue count is climbing — now at 36. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **54 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $10,784 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 53 days past due with 35 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **6 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $17,424 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** The oldest overdue task is 13 days past due with 28 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **46 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $15,170 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Shaan Lagisetty (CNG-20251169):** The oldest overdue task is 27 days past due with 18 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **19 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** The oldest overdue task is 7 days past due with 14 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **19 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $12,380 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Karim-Merchant:** 6 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **20 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 51 days past due with 6 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **14 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** The oldest overdue task is 7 days past due with 4 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **16 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 9 payment tasks due this week.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 3 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **24 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 7 payment tasks due this week.
**Angel Pacheco:** Carrying 58 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Giselle Garcia:** Carrying 45 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Jonas De Cardenas:** Carrying 39 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Jeff:** Carrying 34 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.

276 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **247 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 36 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$78,605 in payments going out this week** across 53 tasks — make sure funds are available. $10,000 expected in from 1 client payment. Heavy week ahead for Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496) and Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199) — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 58. This needs to turn around today.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 40 overdue (oldest: 9d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **25 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 42 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 14 overdue (oldest: 7d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **19 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 20 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 4 overdue (oldest: 7d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **16 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 24 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
